title: HG Mould Remover Foam Spray, Black Mould & Mildew Cleaner, Removes Stains – 500ml
features: HG Mould Remover: Effortlessly eliminates all moulds, making filthy black stains disappear in under 30 minutes, whilst preventing re-growth
Suitable for a wide range of surfaces: Removes mould & fungus from plastered walls, tiles, bathroom seals, grout, windows, outdoor furniture & more
For indoor or outdoor use: Kills algae & mould marks around swimming pools, in the garage, shed, washing area, shower cubicle, sauna & conservatory
Fast acting: This rapid use mould & mildew remover immediately cleans fungus marks from damp areas. The foam remains on the surface for longer & reduces splashing
500ml size HG Mould Foam Spray: Anti mould cleaner with a bleaching effect. Low odour formula. Test first in an inconspicuous place before applying
description: Product Description The HG Mould Remover Foam Spray is a fast-acting formula which gets to work in under 30 minutes, quickly removing mould, mildew and fungus, whilst also preventing re-growth. The foam remains on the surface for longer to tackle stubborn mould marks, and features a low odour formula with less chance of splashing. Ideal to use on the silicon seal between the bathtub and wall, on outdoor furniture, around window frames or on plastered walls. This anti mould foam is also suitable for cleaning grout, painted ceilings, swimming pool tiles and seals, as well as mouldy stains in the garage, shed and conservatory. We also have a liquid spray version of the mould and mildew cleaner: HG Mould Remover Spray. Includes: 1 x HG Mould Remover Foam Spray (500ml spray bottle, 632050106) How to use HG mould cleaner: The mould spray has a bleaching effect. If in doubt, test first in an inconspicuous place. 1. Spray the surface from 3 to 5 cm away. 2. Leave for 30 minutes, then clean with water and a sponge. Contains chlorine based bleaching agents. We recommend using gloves and ventilating well during use. Use biocides safely. Always read the label and product information before use. Ingredients Anionic Surfactants, Chlorine-based Bleaching Agents <5% Safety Warning Attention: we recommend you ventilate well during use and wear rubber/plastic gloves. Prevent splashing your clothing, gloss paint or slats. Rinse immediately with water on contact. Prevent contact with metals, such as prints on decorative strips, aluminium and stainless steel. Do not treat coloured surfaces. We do not recommend the use of this product on ceilings with decorative plaster. Some permanent brown discolouring may occur after use on light elastic joints (e.g. silicon sealant). You may also see brown colouring on poorly glazed tiles or old tiles with hair cracks. This brown colour could be removed with hypo (sodium thiosulphate) which is available from the customer service department upon request. The bottle may not be reused. Medical personnel can request the data sheet via +31 (0)36 54 94 777. The consumer's information sheet can be obtained via www.HG.eu danger h314- causes severe skin burns and eye damage. H410- very toxic to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Euh2o6- warning! Do not use together with other products. May release dangerous gases (chlorine). P101- if medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. P102- keep out of reach of children. P280- wear protective gloves and eye protection. P303+p361+p353- if on skin (or hair): take off immediately all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water [or shower]. P305+p351+p338- if in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. P501- dispose of contents and container in accordance with all local, regional, national and international regulations. Contains: sodium hypochlorite, einecs: 231-668-3 See more

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Transport and store cool, dark and in an upright position. Keeps longer at lower temperatures.
